purpose: Regression fixtures for Gate 2. After exact identity confirmation, the auditor defaults to all four earthquake evidence lanes unless the user narrows to one or more lanes.
fixture_notice: All sample places and source links in this file are workflow fixtures. They are not public evidence about real buildings.
required_menu_labels: OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest clearance after damage or tag

cases.description: After identity confirmation, the auditor defaults to all four earthquake lanes and tells the user they may narrow the run.

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
OBO structural permit or review evidence
Latest post-earthquake tag / status
Latest clearance after damage or tag

selected_scopes.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
selected_scopes.output_intent: Find target-specific public NSCP, seismic design, structural calculations, or signed/sealed engineering review evidence.

selected_scopes.label: OBO structural permit or review evidence
selected_scopes.output_intent: Find target-specific public OBO or Building Official structural permit, plan review, correction, evaluation, inspection, or related record evidence.

selected_scopes.label: Latest post-earthquake tag / status
selected_scopes.output_intent: Find the latest target-specific official post-earthquake tag, restriction, no-entry, inspection disposition, or equivalent status.

selected_scopes.label: Latest clearance after damage or tag
selected_scopes.output_intent: Find the latest target-specific official clearance, lifting notice, updated green tag, reoccupancy clearance, or signed/sealed stability certificate after damage or tag context.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: For SM City Manila, I can run all four earthquake evidence searches by default: 1. NSCP / seismic design evidence, 2. OBO structural permit or review evidence, 3. Latest post-earthquake tag / status, and 4. Latest clearance after damage or tag. Tell me if you want to narrow this to one or more lanes.

cases.description: The user narrows the default run to one lane.

cases.description: A vague earthquake-safety request must be mapped back to the four lanes instead of treated as a direct safety answer.

scope_menu.label: NSCP / seismic design evidence
OBO structural permit or review evidence

Latest clearance after damage or tag

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: I cannot answer earthquake safety directly from public evidence. For SM City Manila, I can run all four earthquake evidence searches by default or you can narrow to one or more of the four lanes.
clarifying_questions: Should I run all four earthquake evidence lanes, or narrow to one or more of NSCP/seismic evidence, OBO structural review evidence, post-earthquake tag/status, and clearance after damage/tag?

cases.description: A non-earthquake or broad building-code request is refused or routed outside the four-lane earthquake auditor.

user_intake.raw_user_scope_request: Check all building permits and fire safety.

scope_confirmation.user_facing_prompt: That request is outside this earthquake-only auditor. I can run all four earthquake evidence lanes by default, or you can narrow to one or more of the four listed lanes.
clarifying_questions: Do you want the earthquake-only auditor to run all four lanes for SM City Manila?
